name: promptplus
description: AI-powered prompt enhancement for macOS — global hotkey to rewrite and restructure prompts via OpenAI

scripts.build: npm run icon && electron-builder --mac && npm run sign
scripts.build:dmg: npm run icon && electron-builder --mac dmg && npm run sign
scripts.build:zip: npm run icon && electron-builder --mac zip && npm run sign
scripts.build:dir: npm run icon && electron-builder --mac dir && npm run sign

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: PromptPlus needs to send keystrokes to copy and paste enhanced text in your active application.
